highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?
faqs.answer:
Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.
The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.
Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

faqs.question: Which industries hire students with a BTech CSE qualification?
faqs.answer:
Graduates with a BTech degree in CSE are in high demand across a plethora of work fields, as everything is ruled by computer technology these days and every industry needs strong software applications, network security, and database management systems for effective working. A few top industries recruiting BTech in CSE graduates are given here:
IT & Software
Product Development
E-Commerce and Digital Commerce
Cloud Computing & AI
Data Science & Analytics
Banking and FinTech
Automotive
Healthcare

placements.overview:
Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology, is located in Madurai, Tamil Nadu. Established in 2009, it is a private institute approved by AICTE. Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology provides 11 UG and PG courses in 6 specialisations, namely Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Automobile Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in both Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech are some of the courses offered at Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology. Some of the stream in which these courses are offered include Engineering. The total fee at Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology ranges between INR 50,000 and 2,00,000. Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology has a student intake of 384 for all the courses. Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

At the UG and PG levels, Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose offline courses, from stream like Engineering. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech. The Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology course fee ranges between INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: It is a nice place to learn about the life, not only studies.

review_content.Placements: In our batch 2012-2016, all admissions are filled up in our college. About 50% of the students from our college got placed in many companies now. The salary depends on their knowledge level. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 8,000 per month and the highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. IT sectors are top recruiters for our course. Top roles offered in our course are system analyst and QA resource. In our course, the highest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the average salary package offered is 2 LPA. None of the students from our college tried to go for an internship.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good faculty members but average placements.

review_content.Placements: I am not sure about the total percentage of students who are placed through college. The minimum salary offered would be around Rs. 5,000 per month. Top recruitment companies which visited our college were Sutherland Global Services and Service Advisory. I think none of the students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was not completed at that time, but now it's very good. Though it was not completed, all the facilities were better. Classrooms, library, and everything were good. There was no Wi-Fi facility. I am not sure about the present-day condition. It is a well-built college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed from our college. Internships are offered at our college. Companies hire students. The highest salary offered in our course is Rs. 35,000 per month, and the lowest is Rs. 10,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Classrooms are neat. Labs are of good quality. They do not conduct sports and games. The canteen food is normal. Wi-Fi is slow. The library can be used to study silently. I am a day scholar.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are good. They help to clarify doubts. Knowledge is more important in our lives. In the semester exams, the questions are tough. 50% is the pass percentage. Some subjects are easy to pass. At our college, we are studying Java and C++.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: A college with really a good infrastructure

review_content.Placements: Above 90% of Students were placed in our Course. Infosys and TCS are the major recruiting companies in my Course. 90% percent of students got internships in Infotech and Winways. Mostly, all students got placed in various companies. And this college also helps in improving knowledge about placement process.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very attractive and spectacular. The standard of the hostel is good but there is a scope for improvements. Hostel food quality is always good. Hostel fees are Rs 50,000 per student. The hostel is more convenient to students and the hostel warden is friendly to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Gain knowledge and life experience.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, more than 60% were placed. Several IT companies, start-ups are recruiting our students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, there are separate hostels for both men and women. Hostel infrastructure is very neat and highly ventilated. And the hostel mess food is also very healthy and tasty as well. The main motto is to provide good food to each and every student in the hostel.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are highly knowledgeable. They taught us both theoretical and practical as well. For every 20 students, there is a mentor throughout the year. They not only focus on the curriculum but also concentrate on one's well being. They teach us personality development.

description: Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is available for BE/BTech and other courses. BTech admission at Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology is based on TNEA counselling. To check out the Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology TNEA cutoff 2025, students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff ranks across different rounds, categories and branches. Further updates are below:

Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology TNEA cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to the BTech course and its various branches. The cutoff was announced for the reserved and unreserved categories belonging to the All India quota.
For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 127001 to 226096. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

Students can view the Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Fatima Michael College of Engineering and Technology was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 127001.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very attractive and spectacular. The standard of the hostel is good but there is a scope for improvements. Hostel food quality is always good. Hostel fees are Rs 50,000 per student. The hostel is more convenient to students and the hostel warden is friendly to students.

reviews.review_heading: Gain knowledge and life experience.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are separate hostels for both men and women. Hostel infrastructure is very neat and highly ventilated. And the hostel mess food is also very healthy and tasty as well. The main motto is to provide good food to each and every student in the hostel.

faqs.answer: Courses offered by Vikas Group Of Institutions are M.E./M.Tech, M.Pharma, After 1th Diploma, B.Pharma, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies. Vikas Group Of Institutions offers specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Structural Engineering, VLSI Design, M.Pharma specializations in Pharmacy Practice, Quality Assurance, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Vikas Group Of Institutions for students?

faqs.answer: Vikas Group Of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.M.PharmaCandidate must have passsed B.Pharma. and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.B.PharmaCandidates should have completed 16 years of age by the date of commencement of admission or on such other date as may be notified by the CET committee. There is no upper age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidate

reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not bad. The environment is very pleasant and good. Surroundings are not constructed by any industry. The college area is a hilly region. The college has a peaceful and greenery environment. The total area of the campus is more than 100 acres.

reviews.review_heading: I am extremely fortunate to be a member of Vikas' group.
reviews.review_text: My master of business administration course at our university made a good first impression. It is a beautiful environment, and finance, HR, and marketing courses are also available. The journey to the hostel room was pleasant, and the food was adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but hostel facility was bad.
reviews.review_text:
1. Faculty are good and the department is also good.
2. Hostel facility was not good and food was also not tasty. 
That's why me and my friends have taken a room near Vijayawada. 
No games are there.
The facility of games is also insufficient.
The mess is also bad.
There is no internet availability.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Corporate Institute of Science and Technology:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Corporate Institute of Science and Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Corporate Institute of Science and Technology offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Corporate Institute of Science and Technology courses range between INR 39,000 to 1,12,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.
faqs.question: What is the starting salary of an ECE engineer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The positive point for the college is its infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 60 percent students get placed. The lowest package offered in this college is 1.8 LPA and the highest is 8.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, HCL Technologies, Wipro, Syntel, etc. The internship score is 70%. You get placed as a manager, software engineer, etc. in companies. Placement is not very good for weak students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good as compared to other colleges. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are only available in labs and only for faculty members and staff. Hostel provides us good facilities. Mess food is also not that bad, it's manageable but sports facilities are very poor.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My personal experience is that if you do engineering try to take admission in government.

review_content.Placements: The information about our batch in B.Tech mechanical engineering, there are 80 students in one class. The highest package in computer Science engineering is 8 LPA and the lowest package is up to 4 LPA. The student takes an internship out from college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not bad, it is well. The Wi-Fi facilities are available and the classroom is smart. In the hostel some facilities are good but not all facilities are good. Medical facilities are not available and the quality of food is also not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has nice faculty members.

answer.text: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Corporate Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Build the concept with quality education and training based on practical things.

content.Placements: Everything is good at this college; having experienced all aspects, I can say that companies like Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc., come here. The highest package is approximately 6.5 lakhs per annum and is totally based on your skills. All departments are available, and I have chosen the AI & ML branch.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with all the necessary facilities and are well-ventilated and digitally facilitated. You need not worry about any aspect of the campus infrastructure, as water purifiers and coolers are installed on every floor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty members and good placements in 2019 and previous years.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 40% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 30 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Wipro, Intel, Jio, and 50 other companies that visited our campus. Top roles offered were data analyst, data scientist, and programmer.
content.Infrastructure: Our facilities and infrastructure were excellent and outstanding. There were labs, classrooms, and a good library. In our college, a hostel was available. The quality of food served in the mess and canteen was good. Medical facilities sports and games were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The positive point for the college is its infrastructure.

content.Placements: 60 percent students get placed. The lowest package offered in this college is 1.8 LPA and the highest is 8.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, HCL Technologies, Wipro, Syntel, etc. The internship score is 70%. You get placed as a manager, software engineer, etc. in companies. Placement is not very good for weak students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good as compared to other colleges. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are only available in labs and only for faculty members and staff. Hostel provides us good facilities. Mess food is also not that bad, it's manageable but sports facilities are very poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My personal experience is that if you do engineering try to take admission in government.

content.Placements: The information about our batch in B.Tech mechanical engineering, there are 80 students in one class. The highest package in computer Science engineering is 8 LPA and the lowest package is up to 4 LPA. The student takes an internship out from college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not bad, it is well. The Wi-Fi facilities are available and the classroom is smart. In the hostel some facilities are good but not all facilities are good. Medical facilities are not available and the quality of food is also not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has nice faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 70% got placed. The highest salary package is 20 LPA, the lowest salary package is 3 LPA and the average salary package is 10 to 14 LPA. TCS, Zebronics, and other software companies come for placement. Students are provided skills like Java, python, c++, etc., and English communication skills.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with Wi-Fi but not in working condition. Classrooms are too cleaned. Labs are available. Library has all the editions with good facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is too good. There are industrial visits. Semester exams are good, not difficult. The pass percentage is 28 marks.

highlights.summary: The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Government Engineering College, Bhojpur admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is awesome in everything.

review_content.Placements: Placements didn't take place. Internship opportunity is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is matching international standards. It has upgraded its classrooms to facilitate teaching through modern tools and techniques. There are centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, library, a state-of-the-art seminar room and a fully equipped auditorium with seating capacity of over 750 persons. College takes pride in being a differently-able friendly campus with new ramps, elevators, and special washrooms. There are various facilities to address the reading, hearing, and understanding requirements of various students. Library is an empowering unit with a resource centre for visually challenged possessing an array of audio-visual aids to assist in the process of self actualisation. College is endowed with renovated hostels, medical support systems with physiotherapy centre, modern gymnasium, swimming pool, a huge parking facility, air conditioned sports complex, and playground of international standards. A complete smoke and vehicle free zone. College provides an eco-friendly environment to its students with the latest initiatives of solar heating, rainwater harvesting, and paper. It has well-equipped labs and libraries. Everything is awesome. New campus is built next year this college is shifted to ara in main city.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The newest government engineering college of Bihar.

review_content.Placements: Since, our college is a new engineering college established in the year 2019. So, there is no placement record. The first batch from here will pass out in the year 2023 so placement data will be available after that. But as of now no chance of placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Till now our college do not have its own infrastructure. Our college is running in the campus of Bakhtiyarpur college of engineering. But building of our college is under construction in the Ara (Bhojpur) district of Bihar. Since our college has not its own infrastructure but then we have a decent library, classrooms, labs etc. No hostel and no space for any sports.

individual_reviews.title: Here is my review about my college, Government Engineering College, Bhojpur.

content.Placements: So its a newly constructed college so placement figure will be more clear after few years, but as of now, last year, hill edutech Pvt. Ltd. hired around 10 students from different branches with 6.4 LPA. The internship figure will also be more clear in upcoming years .
content.Infrastructure: The campus of this college is comparably small compared to any other government engineering college in Bihar. Wi-Fi facilities are not available in classrooms, and libraries have good labs that are well equipped; some more lab equipment is being installed and will be fully operational in a few weeks. The hostel is a mess, but the food is good, so there is nothing wrong with it.

overview_faqs.question: How much salary does an Engineer get?
overview_faqs.answer: Many companies offer great salary packages in metro cities which are hub for IT companies as well as other reputed MNCs. The salary also differs as per the entry level. After gaining experience of 2-5 years, you can expect a salary of 8-12 LPA and then shift from technical to managerial roles.Know more about -Engineering Career

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.question: Can you elaborate on the BSc Design career?
overview_faqs.answer: Sure, the BSc Design career scope is vast, with diverse career paths based on the specialisation you choose to study. It will offer you not just the theoretical knowledge but also help you gain creative and technical skills. You can even go for freelance opportunities once you gain relevant skills and experience in the industry.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued Jan(2026) B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The location of the college is good, but the faculty and staff are not that good.

review_content.Placements: There are about 50 students in the class, and there is no placement; there are no companies in that campus. Due to less company availability, there is a small number of students that take admission in that course. Nothing is offered in our course in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure of our college and our hostel is the worst ever I have seen. There are no specific labs, classroom libraries, or good medical facilities. The food in our hostel mess is also very bad medical facilities are also not good . The availability of sports and games is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing College Near Chandigarh.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50 to 60% of the students get placed in Aryans Group of Colleges. In recent times, the highest package is 8 LPA and the average package is 3 LPA. Tech Mahindra, Lestrack, and TCS are some companies visiting most often. 80-90% of students get internships across all course groups. Software engineers, Human Resources, and graphic designers are some of the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available for our course are more than sufficient. The campus and labs have good coverage of high-speed 5G network. Labs have modern computers with the latest software. The library has almost every book related to our course, though some exceptions may happen. Shared rooms are available in the hostel and the pricing is fair. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very good and delicious. There is a lack of medical and sports facilities.

overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Aryans Group of Colleges is around INR 93000 - INR 270000.

overview_faqs.question: Is Aryans Group of Colleges a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Aryans Group of Colleges is a well-known institution for B.Ed, B.E. / B.Tech, D.Pharma, B.A, B.Com, BBA, BCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Aryans Group of Colleges has a rating of 3.61 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.62 on Campus Life, 3.43 on Placements, 3.79 on Faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Aryans Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I will say one thing, this is the best college. Take admission here.

content.Placements: There were too many students at the college. One of the most leading colleges in the whole area. The package was very affordable for everyone and also free for the orphans and EWS. Top recruiting companies visit our college every year for placements. Many students were selected for placements. From my batch approximately, 75% of students got placements. In my course, all the practicals were done properly.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were incredible. Everything was excellent, and they took care of the students well. Hostel was on the side of college with a good environment and healthy food. The wardens there were very helpful and took care of every student like they were in their home.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best.

content.Placements: Above 45% of students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. I am a law student, that's why I don't know. At least 60% of students got internships. I don't know but I suggest you do hard work and gain whatever you want to become in your life. On the other side of the mountains and earth, it is not the same.
content.Infrastructure: It is very good. Every facility is provided in our college like classrooms, labs, and a library for study. Hostel facilities are also very good. The infrastructure of our college is very good and friendly. Fests are held in our college. Medical students get an opportunity to go to the hospital.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued Jan(2026) B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The location of the college is good, but the faculty and staff are not that good.

content.Placements: There are about 50 students in the class, and there is no placement; there are no companies in that campus. Due to less company availability, there is a small number of students that take admission in that course. Nothing is offered in our course in our college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure of our college and our hostel is the worst ever I have seen. There are no specific labs, classroom libraries, or good medical facilities. The food in our hostel mess is also very bad medical facilities are also not good . The availability of sports and games is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amazing College Near Chandigarh.

content.Placements: Almost 50 to 60% of the students get placed in Aryans Group of Colleges. In recent times, the highest package is 8 LPA and the average package is 3 LPA. Tech Mahindra, Lestrack, and TCS are some companies visiting most often. 80-90% of students get internships across all course groups. Software engineers, Human Resources, and graphic designers are some of the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available for our course are more than sufficient. The campus and labs have good coverage of high-speed 5G network. Labs have modern computers with the latest software. The library has almost every book related to our course, though some exceptions may happen. Shared rooms are available in the hostel and the pricing is fair. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very good and delicious. There is a lack of medical and sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Choose the best, give your best, and achieve success.

content.Placements: There are very good placement opportunities, with many students getting placed in top companies that showcase good skills and talent. Companies such as Flipkart, Microsoft, Amazon, Accenture, Tata, Tesla, IBM, Tech Mahindra, and Wipro visit our campus. 40 percent of students got internships with paid jobs. The highest package offered for my department is 13 LPA, with the lowest average being 1.8 LPA and 4.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is beautiful, with greenery, clean floors, well-manufactured classrooms, digital boards, and projectors. Facilities include classrooms, libraries, canteens, labs, playgrounds, mess, and transport. Hostel food offers a variety of items and snacks. Sports and game facilities are also available.

admission_overview.title: Aryans Group of Colleges Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Aryans Group of Colleges admits students based on their merit. The college offers programmes at UG in the streams of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing. Candidates should meet the eligibility qualification set by the Aryans Group of Colleges. Candidates need to visit the official website to apply for Aryans Group of Colleges admission. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department. Aryans Group of Colleges fee for UG is INR 93,000 - 6,00,000. Candidates selected for admission have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

A library is also provided in this college. The hostel is cheap and the best, all facilities like medical and sports are available. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is cheap and best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi with limitations is given and all types of laboratories needed for the course are available. The classrooms are spacious and clean. All books related to the course are available in the library. Teachers give sufficient notes and study material related to course requirements. The hostel is good, cheap, and best, giving healthy and hygienic food at affordable prices. Medical facilities are available 24X7 for students. Fields are available for sports and games inte...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, cheap and best for middle class family students.
reviews.review_text: College is having good infrastructure and facilities are also good Wi-Fi is available and labs and classrooms are fully Facillated. Library is also available. reviews.review_heading: It is not in Chandigarh. ? Please get this thing in the mind.
reviews.review_text:
Everything in that college was below the average (the washroom, the canteen, hostel).
Even the drinking water cooler was broken and it was never repaired. The faculty members were not so experienced, they were just like us. The only difference was they were graduated before us.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aryans Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the library was available. The laboratories were also available for the students. There was no Wi-Fi facility for the students. The classrooms were in good condition. The quality of food served in the mess was not very good. Medical facilities were not available for the students. Sports and games were provided. The food served in the mess and canteen was not good. Student gets ill while consuming food from hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by Aryans Business SchoolReviewed on 24 Dec 2020)
reviews.review_heading: I have a very good experience, and I am highly satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are the best in hostel premises, and I think one device is offered to every 3 hostel rooms. Classrooms are well-maintained and air-conditioned. The library is good where more than 50 students can study at a time. Canteen is neat and clean with hygienic food. Every year our college organises sports events, and games are also played here.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst ever college in Punjab or in the world.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is the worst. Only a few incomplete buildings are standing with no facilities. They don't have a projector. In our time, only one projector was available, which was not working properly. Classrooms were very dirty. Juniors are given good classrooms up to first-year, but then they are shifted to broken and dirty classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good for the ones who do not want to spend much for a degree.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for stutents in college and also in hostels. The latest books are not available in library. Hostel food is not good. Canteen is very small. Toliets in the college as well as in hostel are very poor in hygine.1 small ground which is not well maintain for any sport.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is located on the outskirts of the city and provides professional education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good hostel facilities with air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. Classrooms have a seating capacity of about 50 students, and there are well-equipped labs and all sports facilities. The food served in the hostel is average with a fixed weekly menu and seasonal vegetables. Our college canteen is good with seating facilities. Most of the sports equipment and gym facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: Select the institute after observing its past & present performance, else will ruin your life.

review_content.Placements: During the period 2010-2015, there is good strength in the college & nearby companies also shows a keen interest in selecting the students from this institute. But as the time passes, there is a gradual decrement in the admission in this institution which eventually leads to decrement in the placement of the existing students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The labs & classrooms are equipped with Wi-Fi. review_summary.college_name: KITM - Kurukshetra Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Annual technological fest and cultural fests are organized by the college.

content.Placements: Various reputed companies visit here to provide job opportunities to the students of all departments. They provide good packages to the students. Many students were shortlisted by them. Basically, for my course they were offered job profile for web Developer, software testing etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus is outstanding it is completely lush green with all the facilities provided to the students. Multiple laboratories are there for us to enhance our practical knowledge. Classrooms are well furnished. Projectors are available in every classroom. Hostel, Library, Canteen and medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: KITM Kurukshetra review for B.Tech.

content.Placements: Very few tier 3 companies came for placement, offering pkge less than 2Lakh per annum. Not much efforts were made by college management for calling and inviting good companies. Even few fake companies came in campus that was highly disappointing. Most of the good candidates went for off campus joint placements in other institutes and placed in good organizations.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is fine 3.5/5 College is placed in lush green farms on Kurukshetra pehowa road and all the required facility are provided like labs, Classrooms, Library is okay, average sports facility. FOOD in hostel mess is poor though and needs improvement.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Select the institute after observing its past & present performance, else will ruin your life.

content.Placements: During the period 2010-2015, there is good strength in the college & nearby companies also shows a keen interest in selecting the students from this institute. But as the time passes, there is a gradual decrement in the admission in this institution which eventually leads to decrement in the placement of the existing students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The labs & classrooms are equipped with Wi-Fi. The shortage of professors which lead this institute to backfoot & therefore the students do not show a keen interest in taking the admission in this institute. However, what's the need for such infrastructure?

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2014 and 2015 but not in 2016 and further.

content.Placements: The placement for my batch and my seniors' batch is somewhat different. My seniors didn't take the college placement so seriously, so they didn't take a pain to sit in the placement process. Due to that, we faced difficulty in our placements. You have to make efforts to get placed. You have to struggle to get selected. You should participate off-campus also.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite impressive. The ground is very good. The labs are good. But they don't have a good cafeteria. The classrooms can be more advanced. Games like basketball have a future. If you are interested in playing and making a team, then only you have any future in games. The college itself doesn't motivate anyone to play games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: KITM is one of the best colleges according to infrastructre and faculty

content.Placements: The placement provided by the college was somewhat up to the mark. Around 70% of the students are placed in the companies while others are pursuing the post graduation course from the university like IIT, NIT and Kurukshetra University. The companies which visited the campus were Micromax, Monster.com that placed some students in NIIT and some students were placed in TCS and HP.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructre was just superb. one can sit and enjoy the beauty of nature as well the study. The labs were fully air-conditioned and classrooms were big and clean. The quality of food was not too good but not too bad either in the canteen. The library facilities are good, and the reading and study sections were good. There is no noise at all. Everyone can study very easily at the study section and books provided to us are in good condition. Each and every book was available in the book section.

individual_reviews.title: Definitely go for this college because of the faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: On campus, many companies and many MNCs come. 90% students get placed through placements. Many students get internships at MNCs. Most students get developer position.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of a campus is very cool and calm. There are many facilities provided by the university, including individual Wi-Fi for each class and lab.
content.Faculty: From a faculty point of view, it is good to have a helping nature towards students. Management is also nice. They conduct three exams in each semester.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Our college had many students. The lowest salary package and the highest salary package were offered. Top recruiting companies visited our campus. Students got excellent opportunities with the high salary packages offered by foreign companies. We were happy and fully satisfied.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided excellent infrastructure. Our labs, library, sports room, canteen, mess, sports, and games were good. Medical facilities were available. There is a music room. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There was a chemistry lab, a computer lab, a biology lab, a physics lab, a home lab, and a science lab.

paragraphs: Chhotubhai Gopalbhai Patel Institute of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering and IT and Software.Chhotubhai Gopalbhai Patel Institute of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and ACPC Admission. hostel_campus.college_name: Chhotubhai Gopalbhai Patel Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Definitely go for this college because of the faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of a campus is very cool and calm. There are many facilities provided by the university, including individual Wi-Fi for each class and lab.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided excellent infrastructure. Our labs, library, sports room, canteen, mess, sports, and games were good. Medical facilities were available. There is a music room. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There was a chemistry lab, a computer lab, a biology lab, a physics lab, a home lab, and a science lab.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very huge campus. It has a green field, a cricket ground, a basketball ground, a volleyball ground, a badminton ground, and many more facilities for playing. Our campus provides free Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is very neat and clean. It has playgrounds, libraries, and workshops. Central library consists of more than 1 lakh books. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Many events and sports competitions are held in our college every year.

reviews.review_heading: Uka tarsadiya University.
reviews.review_text: The campus has developed labs. Library has a large collection of the books and a large reading area. Wi-Fi covers the whole campus. The college has hostels of its own. It has an active and hygienic canteen and a mess. The college conducts sports week and fest every year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good faculty and infrastructure, but the placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. I don't know about the hostel because I am a day scholar. The institution has a very big library for students. My friend stays in the hostel, and he said that the hostel food is not that great.

reviews.review_heading: This college's infrastructure and facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is beautiful and always clean. Food offered in the hostel is tasty.  Facilities like library, classrooms, canteen, mess are available. Winter sports programme is conducted in a very good way

reviews.review_heading: The engineering department of UTU.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys in the campus. Both buildings have their own mess which provides breakfast and dinner to students. Boys hostel is very well ventilated, whereas the girls hostel is somewhat packed and doesn't have good ventilation .

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were excellent, air-conditioners were not there, but the nature was good. Well-lighted classrooms air-conditioners were not there, but all the classes were well-ventilated via windows. The infrastructure was excellent, and they have a playground, gym, indoor game clubhouse, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with large campus and well equipped facilities.
reviews.review_text: It has a great infrastructure well maintained. Entire Campus is equipped with free Wi-Fi, classrooms with projectors, well-equipped Laboratory and it has a huge library with lots of books and a cricket ground. It also has a canteen and a mess for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has an amazing infrastructure, good surrounding ambience and best library.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides best-in-class facilities like Wi-Fi, games, a peaceful environment, a clean campus, beautiful gardens and a museum. Hostel rooms are not very huge, but if we have friends around, we would hardly feel that. The mess provides good quality hot food every day and night.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent faculty members and very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our department are very good like very good Wi-Fi facility, well-maintained labs and classrooms. A huge central library is available with all the facilities. There are poor facilities in the hostel like the food served in the mess is not much good, and very excessive oil is used in the food. Average facilities are provided for medical and sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a dream college, and I suggest you to choose it.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility and A1 labs are available here. The library here is one of the biggest libraries, and the classrooms have study environment. The food served in the hostel is decent, and the hostel provides you with facilities of gym, cricket ground and many other sports. The climate is pollution-free and calm. The timing of the hostel is 7:00 pm in the evening, and after that, you cannot go out of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by each and every faculty member and the facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: Our university is one of the best in Gujarat when it comes to the infrastructure and facilities provided to the students. The hostel is very much clean. They surely give much importance to the hygiene. Quality of food available in canteen is so nice. We have a sports ground for playing cricket, basketball, volleyball, etc. As we have a pharmacy department in our college, medical facilities are easily available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in 2018 were not good. Satisfying faculty members. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the main characteristic of our institute that grabbed my attraction towards it. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, sports and games, are all fully functional and efficient. Our university has south Gujarat's biggest library. The workshop facility for mechanical and automobile engineering branches are extraordinary. The quality of the food served in the canteen is extreme, and no complaints about it. I didn't face any issues related to the infrastructure.

overview_faqs.answer: SVS College of Engineering (SVSCE) is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. SVS College of Engineering (SVSCE) boasts an impressive review rating of 3.88 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.1 for Campus Life, 3.36 for Placements, 3.6 for Faculty, and 4.07 for Infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is not accepting any incoming admissions now because it has been sold, but it is good college.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students get placed in various companies and some are yet to get placements. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the lowest salary pacakge offered is 2.8 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Wipro is the top recruiting company, and around 50% of students get internships with the project in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are the best. It has a good ambiance to study, a good quality library with all types of books, and journals from different authors and publications, it even has lots of technical activities to participate in.

reviews.review_heading: It is not accepting any incoming admissions now because it has been sold, but it is good college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are the best. It has a good ambiance to study, a good quality library with all types of books, and journals from different authors and publications, it even has lots of technical activities to participate in.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides excellent placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, laboratories, spacious classrooms, library, central library, and separate library for each department, plenty of laboratory equipment, etc. Hostel facilities were very good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was excellent. Sports and medical facilities were also provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has an excellent infrastructure that makes learning interesting.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available here are labs, lab equipment, library, department library, sports, hostel, etc. The food quality is very good. Medical facilities, stationery shop, canteen, mess, ambulance, bus facility and wheelchair are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college regarding fee, sports, etc.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel from the morning at 6 am till night at 10 pm. Labs have every equipment. Food is not bad. Our college gives preference to sports, especially in volleyball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I am well satisfied because of the infrastructure, facilities and friendly instructors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well established, and anyone shall fall in love with that. Our department has more than 5 laboratories like VLSI lab, digital design laboratory, microcontrollers and microprocessor laboratory, etc. Sports are well guided and encouraged in SVS. The food served is pretty fine, non-vegetarian food is served thrice in a week, and the rest days vegetarian food like sambar, papads, rasam, veggies, etc., are served.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in facilities, infrastructure but dissatisfied with faculty.
reviews.review_text:
1. Have Mechanical lab, electrical lab, electronics lab, computer lab,  1GBPS internet in Library, classroom with projector. 
2. Hostel rooms are first class with four sharing and attached bathroom and toilet, Food also very good and weekly routine basics, sports facilities also available with Hi-Tech gym.

reviews.review_heading: We would have been extremely enjoyed our college days if there was cultural programs.
reviews.review_text:
1. Infrastructure of our college is simply outstanding with library, smartclass available.
2. They provide good hostel and mess facilities when compared to other colleges in Coimbatore and quality is good and they had given same care in both academic and for sports.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are really good.
reviews.review_text: SVS is a home to aesthetically designed buildings which are available with state-of-the-art computer and internet centres. There are modern workshops, state-of-art laboratories, lecture halls, and seminar halls. There are well-stocked libraries. The college provides sports and games fields along with a gymnasium.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, satisfied with the faculty members and their support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. The college has hi-tech libraries with Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are good and are air-conditioned. Faculty members encourage us to do mini-projects during the 2nd year and allow us to go for other campuses to attend conferences and symposium. They give equal importance to sports as well.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is totally good for all types of  curricular and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. CSE, civil, and  ECE branches have separate buildings. There are separate buildings for all the branches. The style of building construction on campus is simply excellent. The college ground looks like a national ground. The college also has a drainage system.

reviews.review_heading: No placements in our college, but it has good faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they provide high-speed Wi-Fi in the whole college. Few digital classrooms are also there in our college. Those digital classrooms are available only for the 1st year of B.Tech students. We are having a huge library, in that library many books are available. There are no medical facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: A good place for improving your knowledge and studies.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. Every block has a different name. There are separate lab facilities for all departments. The teachers are friendly with us. In our college library, there are nearly fifteen lacs books. There is a gym separately for boys and girls, and there is a medical centre that is open for 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to gain the knowledge and explore the world.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best things in our college, and we have everything that a student required in our college. They will maintain cleanliness in all aspects, and we love our management and their principles. Our college is the most reputed one in our state. We scored the top place in our state not only the state throughout the southern part of India.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities with good placements.
reviews.review_text:
Our campus had a good infrastructure which includes good and best laboratories for all the streams. We had a good group for the practice of sports students and WiFi was provided in the hostel at a good speed. We were provided with good indoor facilities like table tennis rooms, gym, meeting and recreation halls.
Classrooms were constructed with vast area which can accommodate more than 80 students. Classrooms were with good ventilation facility.
They provided many varieties of food with good tas...

reviews.review_heading: There is no freedom in this college, only torture is there.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but there is no Wi-Fi inside the campus. A canteen is available but with less number of food items. The college is not giving importance to sports. In the hostel, there are 4 persons per room, and in the mess, the food served is bad. The library here is very small with less number of books. Medical facilities are there, but the doctors are only there to give advice, and only first aid kits are provided. Buses for transportation are less in number here.

reviews_list.review_title: I am very much satisfied with the helpful faculty members of our college.

Government Engineering College, Palanpur fees is an amalgamation of various components, such as the hostel fee, tuition fee, and the security deposit. These fee components can either be refundable or non-refundable. Candidates who are shortlisted through the Government Engineering College, Palanpur admission process must pay the course fee to secure their seat.

course_details.course_description: At UG level, students can enroll into B.E. / B.Tech at Government Engineering College, Palanpur. This course is offered in a Full Time. To grab a seat at Government Engineering College, Palanpur course, students need to pay a sum of INR 6,000 as the tuition fee. Students must note that this fee info

Tuition
The above-mentioned tuition fee is for male candidate and there is no tuition fee for female candidates. The above-mentioned fee is as per Fee Regulatory Committee(Technical), Gujarat.

overview_faqs.question: Is Government Engineering College, Palanpur a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Government Engineering College, Palanpur is a well-known institution for B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Government Engineering College, Palanpur has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 4.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Government Engineering College, Palanpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best college in North Gujarat.

content.Placements: After this fifth semester, placement starts at the college. There is around a 3.5 LPA average in the college; the highest package is 5 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. To be honest, you should try for off-campus placement more; it can provide you with a really good opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has an old-fashioned structure and the atmosphere is not particularly favorable. Hostel rooms are spacious and equipped with a study table, chair and separate locker. However, the mess quality is not satisfactory, providing breakfast, lunch and dinner at a total monthly cost of around Rs. 3000.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good if you have the ability to self-study.

content.Placements: Almost 80-90 Percent students were placed. The highest package offered was about 8-9 LPA and the lowest was 3 LPA and average package is around 5-6 LPA. The companies like torrent, ultratech, etc. Recruits from here. Almost 80-90 percent of students got internship in companies like torrent, Infosys, etc. Roles like design engineer, instrumentation engineer, automation engineer, power train engineer, research and development Engineer, etc. Are offered in mechanical engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and other facilities are very good. Classrooms are well maintained, Wi-Fi speed is also very good, enough labs with enough number of computers, library provides every type of book along with newspaper and encyclopedia. Hostel is also very good, sometimes food quality us not good but overall taste is nice. College doesn't have Wi-Fi in hostel, toilets and bathrooms are always clean, security is also very good, it has gym, and ground for volleyball and kabaddi, organizes sports events and games every year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am very much satisfied with the helpful faculty members of our college.

content.Placements: We had a mega placement fair for students and only a few students got placed. Placements are quite low in our college. In the mechanical engineering course, placements are high.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department is quite good. The hostel is 3 km away from the college so it is difficult for us to reach the hostel on walking. Overall, the hostel is very good. Our college has good facilities like a library and a computer lab and they are always open for students.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our department are very active and helpful. Teachers are friendly to students so studying is a lot of fun. The study curriculum is quite good. Activities are held very often. Exams are easy to pass. In this course, we learn about machines, gears, and other mechanisms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college was established in 2013, and it provided the best placements in TCS in 2016.

content.Placements: The placements are good. Most of the companies that come here are private, and they offer 20,000-25,000 per month. Overall, the placements are good. Every year, the college conducts a placement fair. This college also provides placements abroad.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. There is a total of 4 departments in Government Engineering College. This college is located at the main Ahmedabad-Palanpur highway.
content.Faculty: The pass percentage is around 18-19%. The total marks in exams are 70, and the passing marks are 23. The faculty members are the best. The teachers are from IITs. They teach us well, and they are very understanding. There are good facilities for exams. There is a separate team to conduct exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college in Palanpur city with faculty members.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of placements are available each year. Many top companies will visit to give a job to students and offer many good packages to students. Students also choose their companies and learn a lot.
content.Infrastructure: Walkable distance from college to the hostel and the infrastructure is also very nice as well as peaceful. There are four departments they are Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mining Engineering are good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good and teach very well. They are understanding the student's needs and support them. They also find the weakness of students and help them. So that is the very nice thing about Government Engineering College Palanpur.

reviews.review_text: Walkable distance from college to the hostel and the infrastructure is also very nice as well as peaceful. There are four departments they are Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mining Engineering are good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college, If you want to study electrical from good faculty members, take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is built few year back only. MEALS are good. Gujarati food is mostly served. Facilities like Almirah, B.Ed fans, table chair is available in each room. You have fill online form for hostel admission. The only con is that hostel is located 1km away from hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, Palanpur.
reviews.review_text: There was a first-class infrastructure here. Wi-Fi, labs, smart boards and all the necessary equipment are available in this institution. Our college provides the very best facilities in classrooms. All other things are also quite good in this institution. All the places are clean and neatly arranged. They offer hygienic food also, and the hostel rooms are also in good condition. We need to bring our own belongings. Other than that, all the necessary equipment and needs will be available all the...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college because it is government and doesn't have very high fees.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, our college is above your expectations because it is number 1 in design. There is a free Wi-Fi facility, and a particular department has its own lab. But the food and canteen are not available in our college. Even for a short distance, there is no registration, and vehicles are also not found easily for transportation.

reviews.review_heading: I will not suggest any student to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only for faculty members, and students are not even allowed to use smartphones on the campus. The mess, medical facilities, sports and games are available here, but their quality is average. So, the infrastructure is totally not impressive.

reviews.review_heading: For a professional course, this college is fine but not good for other courses.
reviews.review_text: The food available in the mess of the hostel was the worst. There was a problem during exams due to the worst quality of food as they won't provide food with proper nutrition, calories and many more. At that time, many students faced health issues, including me. As the contractor was the local person who handles the mess without any legal tender, we faced threats and torture from him. It was the worst experience of my life, and even it was my blunder to choose the hostel of GEC Palanpur.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and sports ground.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fantastic. Our college is WiFi-enabled everywhere. Labs have all the instruments. The library has a peaceful environment and all books. The hostel is about 1km away from the college. The hostel rooms are very good, and the facilities provided in the rooms are beds, study tables etc. The mess food is very hygienic and tasty. Medical facilities are available in college and hostel. Sports like cricket, football, table tennis, basketball, etc., are available in t...

reviews.review_heading: Students must maintain 75% of which is compulsory, but the results of the students are not good.
reviews.review_text: MIT is an elite private college which is located in Cambridge, Massachusetts in the Boston area. It is a small institution with an enrollment of 4,510 undergraduate students. Admissions are extremely competitive as the MIT acceptance rate is only 7%. Popular courses include computer science, mechanical engineering and mathematics.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and yes, I recommend to others to admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All the branch building design is the same. Totally 8 building in the campus administration, library, canteen, Electrical engineering block, Mechanical engineering block, workshop, Civil engineering block and last Mining engineering block. Parking facilities are also available and in the centre in the campus, garden is there.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine and honest review about college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is limited for personal use. Labs are decent with enough resources. The library isn’t very large, so not many books are available, but the course-related books are available in good numbers. Hostels are okay, and network coverage isn’t good in all areas. Mess food is decent and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: If you wanna enjoy college life with great study too. Here it is what you need!
reviews.review_text: Faculty members over here are too nice, not only for study purposes but also for events and functions. We do have the hostel, not attached to the college but near it. Hostel rectors are too nice, and if we have any problem, we can ask them for help. Hostel mess fee: 2700/- per month (29700/- per annum).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: From learning to leading.

review_content.Placements: The placement is above average for this college. The average package for the placement is about INR 3–8 lacs per annum and the highest package is about INR 9–16 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are TCS, HCL technologies, Wipro, Infosys, etc. The students have to score overall above the 7 CGPA to get an internship as well as recruitment in the companies. The roles offered in those courses are like those of software developers, interns and data analysis interns.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus/hostel is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity to access online resources and research materials. The department is well equipped with state-of-the-art equipment and software tools relevant to the course curriculum. Classrooms are spacious, well-lit and equipped with audio-visual aids such as projectors and smart boards to facilitate effective teaching and learning. The university library is my favorite part of the whole infrastructure; it has a vast collection of books, journals, research papers, and electronic resources related to the course. The hostels are quite good for the students who want to reside on campus. Hostels have their own study rooms and common areas. The hostel premises are maintained regularly for cleanliness and hygiene, with cleaning staff. The food in the mess is average but hygiene-proof. There is also a dispensary for the students and the staff, which is open 24/7. The campus has a sports complex and a gymnasium as well. Overall, the facilities and amenities provided cater to the holistic development and well-being of students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College plays a main role in the life of a student.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students were placed every year. The highest package is 2800000 per annum, the average package is 400000 per annum and the lowest package is 150000 per annum. TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and L&T are the top recruiting companies. 60% of students got internships in TCS and Infosys.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel's facilities are very nice. A total of 8 floors are in our hostel. The Wi-Fi facility should be provided on every floor. The food quality is very nice. The classrooms are good at our university. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus.

(The Universities will offer suitable bridge courses such as Mathematics, Physics, Engineering drawing, etc., for the students coming from diverse backgrounds to prepare Level playing field and desired learning outcomes of the programme) OR The candidates who have passed two years certificate course from Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering and Technology, Longowal (SLIET) shall be eligible.
