review_summary.college_name: I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University - Amritsar Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This is an average college, and if you need average placements, you can join that.

content.Placements: Hi, my name is Ranjit. The college has good education but has some placement issues because there is no big company offered by the college. There are local companies which don’t have the highest package, but it is good and decently wealthy. But if you are a good student, you can also get a good placement. Around 70% of the students are placed. There are computer science subjects that offer computer languages and internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-labeled classes and a new building with modern infrastructure, but there are some issues with the area because the college is not very big. There are ACs in every class, well-equipped classrooms with whiteboards and fans. There is also a computer lab with many computers, but the computers are not really good, and all the computers are older versions.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Dec 2023) B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It was one of the best university.

content.Placements: 75% of students were placed; the minimum package is 6-7 lacs per annum and the highest package is 14 lacs. The top recruiting companies are L&T, Infosys, Jaro, etc. About 70% of students got internships at these companies. If someone really focus on themselves, he or she can easily get placed .
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are very good. I personally enjoyed a lot in this campus. The hostel facility and food were hygienic and tasty. Sports are also preferred on a large scale. On the interdepartmental level or on other college levels, I recommend it to admission.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: From learning to leading.

content.Placements: The placement is above average for this college. The average package for the placement is about INR 3–8 lacs per annum and the highest package is about INR 9–16 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are TCS, HCL technologies, Wipro, Infosys, etc. The students have to score overall above the 7 CGPA to get an internship as well as recruitment in the companies. The roles offered in those courses are like those of software developers, interns and data analysis interns.
content.Infrastructure: The campus/hostel is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity to access online resources and research materials. The department is well equipped with state-of-the-art equipment and software tools relevant to the course curriculum. Classrooms are spacious, well-lit and equipped with audio-visual aids such as projectors and smart boards to facilitate effective teaching and learning. The university library is my favorite part of the whole infrastructure; it has a vast collection of books, journals, research papers, and electronic resources related to the course. The hostels are quite good for the students who want to reside on campus. Hostels have their own study rooms and common areas. The hostel premises are maintained regularly for cleanliness and hygiene, with cleaning staff. The food in the mess is average but hygiene-proof. There is also a dispensary for the students and the staff, which is open 24/7. The campus has a sports complex and a gymnasium as well. Overall, the facilities and amenities provided cater to the holistic development and well-being of students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College plays a main role in the life of a student.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed every year. The highest package is 2800000 per annum, the average package is 400000 per annum and the lowest package is 150000 per annum. TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and L&T are the top recruiting companies. 60% of students got internships in TCS and Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel's facilities are very nice. A total of 8 floors are in our hostel. The Wi-Fi facility should be provided on every floor. The food quality is very nice. The classrooms are good at our university. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College play a crucial role in the life of students.

content.Placements: The college provides both on-campus and off-campus placements. Companies like Zscaler, L&T, etc. came for on-campus placements, giving an average package of 4 LPA. Internship opportunities are provided. The pay scale of these companies is not good. Around 80 percent of students are placed in the CSE department.
content.Infrastructure: There are special rooms in the college and hostels for using Wi-Fi. The infrastructure of this college is amazing. College is full of greenery. There are three boys hostels. Mess meals are good but there are no evening snacks. Other opportunities, like NCC and NSS, are part of this college.

faqs.question: How can I get into I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University - Amritsar Campus for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University - Amritsar Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechThose candidates who have passed minimum 3 years Diploma examination from Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training, Chandigarh or Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering and Technology, Longowal (SLIET), or any such examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted. (The Universities will offer suitable bridge courses such as Mathematics, Physics, Engineering drawing, etc., for the students coming from diverse backgrounds to prepare Level playing field and desired learning outcomes of the programme)
OR
The candidates who have passed two years certificate course from Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering and Tec

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and a great environment to learn. Best college for outsiders.
reviews.review_text: Good hostel with great food. On Monday, you will get paratha with tea, aloo mattar, roti, and dal. On Tuesday, you will get gobi paratha and aaloo kulcha, rice with dal, and on Wednesday, you will get chicken biryani Hyderabadi style if you order it in Swiggy, or else you will get aloo paratha in hostel with dahi.

reviews.review_heading: Really good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, the mess is okay, and the infrastructure is nice. Wi-Fi and lab facilities are good. Libraries have big and nice architecture. Canteen foods quality and prices are good. Sports and game areas are very nice, and tournaments are held twice a year.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the infrastructure and average placements. It has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel. The campus appears to be good in the pictures, but when you visit it, you will find it to be below-average. There is not even a single basketball court. The ground is fine. For students who love sports, this is not the best place. It has gotten much better than before, and it will keep on getting better in the future.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely great faculty, but average placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is up to date as it should be for a government college. Canteen is shared with IIM Amritsar so there is very less place for tech students to sit the canteen. Library is really cool here, mostly magazines are there but if you want a silent place to study then it's worth it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The library is small but maintenance is great. The hostel is under construction. All types of sports are available. Laboratories are clean and the instrument is well-maintained. Air-conditioners are available in classrooms. The canteen is available and the food quality is better.

reviews.review_heading: Our university has good infrastructure and placements. It provifes good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our university has a good infrastructure with air-conditioned classrooms and clean washrooms. The electricity backup is good, but there are limited computers and lab maintenance. The hostel provides average facilities. The food quality is average and there are no medical facilities. Sports are good here.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is under construction. Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. The college is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are decent and a good amount of computer systems are available. Libraries are good but  Wi-Fi is not available. Medical facilities are good. Sports culture is good and they conduct many sports in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University - Amritsar Campus.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. The campus is medium and not so large. It has a huge ground. It has all labs for students' needs. It has a huge library. It has only classrooms and all the extra things. There is no extra space here.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers, infrastructure, and has a very hygienic environment.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, all the laboratories are highly equipped and full of apparatus. The library of our college is average. Many books are easily available in the library. The hostel of our college is under renovation for the next complete semester. Many sports like cricket, football, table tennis, and many more are available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is average and not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good but not better because most of the time we can't take books from the library due to some technical problems. The food served in the mess is average and not good. Medical facilities are also not good, and sports are also good and not better.

review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, but not for students, it is only available for the staff. If it gets connected to students, there is no net provided by the Wi-Fi. Infrastructure is average. Libraries and classrooms are also average, neither the best nor that bad.

content.Infrastructure: Our department has a sports ground, gymkhana, library, and labs. Our college has one of the biggest sports grounds in the city. The food provided in our canteen is of good quality with quantity. The medical checkup camp is conducted by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are good. Some teachers are helpful to students.

content.Placements: There were 40 students in our course. There were no packages available from the college for the students. Several top companies in construction management and business work globally. 2% of students got internships from the college. There are several roles offered, like manager and construction manager.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, but not for students, it is only available for the staff. If it gets connected to students, there is no net provided by the Wi-Fi. Infrastructure is average. Libraries and classrooms are also average, neither the best nor that bad.

faqs.answer: M.P.Nachimuthu M.Jaganathan Engineering College (MPNMJ) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome college and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was awesome. The college building was well designed. The classrooms were neat. The labs were good with internet connection. Many technical and financial books were available in the library. The hostel facilities were good and a canteen was also available. The food was good.

reviews.review_heading: I like this college and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and hostel facilities are good. The classrooms are neat and clean. The computer labs are good. The Wi-Fi facility is also available. The library is good. The hotel food is good. The 24-hour hot water facility. The canteen is also available. The sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: A college that is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: The college has the worst infrastructure in Erode district. The college has a very big library and is in second place in Erode district. There is no medical facility. Few games and sports are supported for all the students, and you can practise for the institution high-level competitions. Boys hostel is old, and mess provides the worst food. More events, fests, and extracurricular activities are conducted in the college. The scholarship is provided to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure, good faculty members and more.
reviews.review_text: When saying about infrastructure of my college, there is only two buildings used for classrooms and labs. Very less facilities. Here one small library is located. And play ground was awesome but there is no playing kit for athletics. One old gym was here for the physical fitness.

Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Architecture & Planning. On the other hand, at the PG level, the PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET) offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET) courses range between INR 1,46,000 to 3,12,000.

PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering.

faqs.question: Q: Is PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET) a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline awarded by any of the Universities recognized by UGC or AIU with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories (VJ/DT- NT(A), NT(B), NT(C), NT(D), SBC, SEBC) and PwD belonging to Maharashtra State only) or its equivalent. Candidates appeared for the final year examination are also eligible to apply. Maharashtra State candidate must have obtained more than zero score in MAH CET 2020. All India/Jammu and Kashmir Migrant candidate should have obtained more than zero score in MAH CET/CAT/CMAT/MAT/GMAT/ATMA/XAT.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor's Degree in the relevant stream of Engineering and Technology or Pharmacy or Architecture from All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent. Backward class categories and PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only should have minimum 45% marks.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply. Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.

review_summary.college_name: PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am slightly satisfied with the placement criteria.

content.Placements: In the previous year, a total of 140 students were placed out of 210, which was the total strength of the final year students. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA, the lowest was 2 LPA, and the average was 5 LPA to 6 LPA. There are no internships for third-year students. We have to grab them on our own. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good. It comes under the pote trust and it has all the engineering buildings just side by side. We have to go from this building to that building for our small practical session. There is no proper arrangement of labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: Placement in our college is good. Almost 50% of students were placed every year. the highest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 and the lowest salary offered is nearly Rs. 15-20,000. L & T, TCS, DAFS, EPIC, and many more companies visited the campus for placements. The roles offered to the students were related to business analyst, software developer, and tester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Facilities like digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, open and closed library, and medical facility, are available in the campus. The quality of labs is well furnished. Cctv cameras are installed in each classroom and labs. I did not face any infrastructure related issue.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The college and the infrastructure are very nice.

content.Placements: Placements were good at P. R. Patil. Big and small companies including MNCs were here for campus placements. In IT and CSE, most of the students were offered the role of software engineers. The previous batch, as well as the batch of 2016, had quite good placement ratios.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities of all labs and library are very good here. Whichever book was needed by students regarding a particular subject was always made available to them. Even the classrooms are good here. The classrooms are quite airy, and ventilation is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: This is a student-friendly institution.

content.Placements: There are least placements in our college for civil engineering students. As most of the students of civil engineering focus on the government sectors, there is less concentration on placements. If there is any chance of placements, then college itself takes effort for students.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers an eco-friendly environment. Wi-Fi connectivity is good. Labs and classrooms provide sufficient equipment required. The library is also good. There is sufficient availability of books. The college provides all other facilities as per students requirements.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college and facilities are really good.

content.Placements: Placements of the college are very good. The placement rate is the best among the colleges in Pune. Reputed companies visit the campus for placements. The highest salary package offered for freshers is 7 LPA. Many companies visit the campus for placements. Almost 70% of the students are offered internships every year. Nice job opportunities are provided to the student as per their branch. Most of the companies that visit the campus hire the students of the electrical engineering department when compared with others.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good Wi-Fi facility. The library is outstanding for the students to read. Almost 21 daily newspapers are available. Quality and certified books are available for students to study. Medical facilities are available 24x7. All the games and sports facilities are available for playing.

reviews.review_heading: I am slightly satisfied with the placement criteria.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. It comes under the pote trust and it has all the engineering buildings just side by side. We have to go from this building to that building for our small practical session. There is no proper arrangement of labs.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Facilities like digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, open and closed library, and medical facility, are available in the campus. The quality of labs is well furnished. Cctv cameras are installed in each classroom and labs. I did not face any infrastructure related issue.

reviews.review_heading: The college and the infrastructure are very nice.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities of all labs and library are very good here. Whichever book was needed by students regarding a particular subject was always made available to them. Even the classrooms are good here. The classrooms are quite airy, and ventilation is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: This is a student-friendly institution.
reviews.review_text: The college offers an eco-friendly environment. Wi-Fi connectivity is good. Labs and classrooms provide sufficient equipment required. The library is also good. There is sufficient availability of books. The college provides all other facilities as per students requirements.

reviews.review_heading: The college and facilities are really good.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good Wi-Fi facility. The library is outstanding for the students to read. Almost 21 daily newspapers are available. Quality and certified books are available for students to study. Medical facilities are available 24x7. All the games and sports facilities are available for playing.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college at an affordable cost.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good and modern education. Facilities like Wi-Fi labs, medical facilities, library, playground, etc. are available. Food provided in the college canteen is very good. There is great maintenance for the campus, classrooms as well as hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There is a library. A cultural centre available for students for having cultural activities. The labs are air-conditioned for students. Equipment is good, and the management staff are good. The college has air-conditioned labs.

reviews.review_heading: For the Education, None other than this college has excellent performance in Amravati.
reviews.review_text: Day by day college is integrating their infrastructure. Each Trade has its own department building. Clean and maintain throughout. Labs, classrooms has Air Conditioners and excellent and relax furniture suitable for students and faculty. Lots of trees and Garden which look good. Hostel facility is also comfortable for students in chip rates.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for high quality education, friendly and helpful faculty and excellent atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are of best qualities and you will be always pleased to have such a atmosphere there are near about 5 workers for the cleanliness of labs classrooms and passages on each and every floor of buildings. As the college is not fully developed the library building shifts every year but I have never came back with empty bag once I entered the library. You will be always respected and treated in special manner if you are interested in sport and games. Labs and classrooms are provided...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college regarding department teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: The college Infrastructure is very good and has been improving every year. We had a good lab for all subjects including all necessary facilities, and the practical Labs were up to the mark, and no one can ask anything more. The Library was decent because of no internet connection during our time. I haven't visited the hostels, but my classmates were happy with the service.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with a few faculty members on the campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is the only facility we think about, but it is not available in our college. The practical lab is present, but the teaching quality is like, they just read it. The only medical facility is available with the ambulance. The quality of the classrooms and the canteen is good, and some of the teaching staff is good.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great college as wished by every student.
reviews.review_text: In PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology college, lots of facilities are provided like public Wi-Fi, separate labs, first-aid, and medical facilities. In this college, we have a stadium for sport and different curriculum activity. The classrooms are good, and labs are excellent. The canteen is provided in the college, and its food is really good and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: There are best faculty, but the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. I think it is the best in Amravati region. There is a separate department for every branch. A separate floor is present for every branch of the 1st year students. They need not do anything regarding infrastructure. In the future, if they need additional infrastructure, then the can build, otherwise, there is no need.

reviews.review_heading: Much convenient in almost all the facts.
reviews.review_text: Well, create an environment for the one who is interested in the related things, likewise, through the library, sports ground, basketball court, and green surrounding. Just time to time study is needed to ensure the good performance of the academics & extracurricular activities. The greenery in the surrounding induces the mind & evolve new ideas related to their work.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the good colleges to pursue your engineering in Amravati.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. It is established in the year 2008. The college provides a lot of facilities to the students. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college provides free bus service to the students. The college doesn't provide hostel facility to the students, but there are some private hostels near to the college. The college offers digital classrooms with the projector and speaker facility. The library is also good and provides a wide range of books related to engineering....

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at MIT Shillong include BDes, BA and MBA. Apart from these courses, the University also offers courses across streams, including Arts, Commerce, Science, Management, Design, Education, and more. Admission to these courses is based on merit and entrance.
Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12 for admission to UG level programme. In addition to that, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as D-Art, NID DAT, UCEED, MITID and others. Similarly, for PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation along with securing valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ CMAT etc.
MIT Shillong placement record reflected a median package of INR 4.5 LPA recieved by the MBA graduates, whereas, for rest of the courses, the median package was INR 3.6 LPA.
Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at MIT Shillong in the table provided below:

BEd, BSc, BDes, BBA, BCom, BSW and more, the median package is INR 3.6 LPA. The University offers various opportunities such as International Exchange Program, International lmmersion Program, International Internship Program and Summer/Winter Internship Program. faqs.answer: The he university offers various courses such as BA, BDes, MA, MBA etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university offers doctorate courses. MIT University Shillong course admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university admits students based on various national-level entrance exam scores such as D-ART, SAT India, CAT/MAT etc. Candidates can apply by filling out the university application form either via online or offline mode. Admissions to various programmes offered at the university are both entrance and merit-based. Students willing to apply for the courses offered at the university can visit the official website of the university and apply for the desired programme by following the steps mentioned below:Step 1: Visit MIT Shillong's official website and click on "Apply Now" pop-up shown on the screen and register yourselfStep 2: Fill out the application form, pay the application and submit the form.Step 3: The admission committee of the university will shortlist the candidates based on several parameters.Step 4: Shortlisted candidates will have to pay the course fee and go through document verification (if specified) for admission confirmation.
faqs.question: Q: How to take admission in MIT Shillong?

faqs.answer: For MIT University Shillong BBA admission, an aspirant need to pass Class 12 with a minimum of 50% (45% for reserved category students) aggregate from a recognised board. Eligible students can fill out the application form via online or offline mode. Admission to this course is merit-based. Candidates with a valid score of the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam can also apply. For further details, candidates can visit the official website of the university.

admission_process.title: MIT University Shillong Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MIT University Shillongadmission 2025are currently open for admission to multiple  courses, like BA, BDes, MA, MBA etc. at the UG and PG, and doctorate levels. Admission to courses can be either be based on merit or entrance exam performance, depending on the chosen course. To secure admission at MITS, students have to fulfill the eligibility rules set by the university. The application process atMIT University Shillongis conducted online. Read more to know more aboutMIT University Shillongcourse admission2025.

MIT University Shillong admission is openfor various programmes. The university provides over 12 courses across multiple specialisations at UG, PG, and certificate levels. The university offers more than 15 courses including specialisations in various streams such as Arts, Design, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Students seeking to apply to the offered programmes can refer to the following table to learn aboutMIT University Shillong admission 2025highlights:
MIT University Shillong Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
15+ courses including specialisations across various specialisations
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
https://mituniversityindia.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG & PhD
Download Now
MIT University Shillong Brochure

MIT University Shillong course admissionis both merit and entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. If deemed necessary, MIT University Shillong may conduct further rounds of interviews or exams. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMIT University Shillong courses:
D-ART,SAT India/Portfolio Review and Interview/MIT-DAT,Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam

MIT University Shillong admission processincludes several steps. Students applying for the programmes offered at the university must ensure to satisfy the course-specific admission criteria as per the university's guidelines. The entire application process is in online mode. Below is the step-wiseadmission process of MIT University Shillong:
1. MIT University Shillong Application Process 2025

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility can visit the official website (https://applicationmitu.extraaedge.com/) of the university to fill out the application form. Candidates need to select the desired course, pay the application fee and upload the required documents to complete the registration.
2. MIT University Shillong Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates are shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the entrance/qualifying exams for the respective courses they chose. The university takes into account both academic merit and entrance exam scores to make a merit list of the eligible candidates for each course. Students are shortlisted by the university based on various parameters, including entrance exams, academic merit, and personal interview (if required). For PhD course admission, students are selected based on the University entrance exam / NET qualification + PI.
3. Counselling and Fee Payment

Once the candidates are shortlisted, the university may contact the candidate for counselling. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theMIT University Shillong feeto confirm their seats at the university.

reviews.review_heading: For the placements students need to do it by themself.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. Laboratories, canteen, and everything were fine to be standards. The canteen and mess food was good as compared to other colleges. The big ground was available for football, cricket, and volleyball so it was good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Campus and surrounding environment are good. Education is decent, but placements can be improved.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure and facilities are very good. Laboratories, classrooms, sports ground, including basketball court facilities and library, are good. The campus is enabled with a Wi-Fi facility. There is a boys hostel, and the air-conditioning facility is optional. The mess is also decent. The canteen is also available with good quality food. Bus facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am slightly satisfied with this college. Our college provides good teachers and poor placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi and a library available in our college are good. Classrooms are huge enough with the projector facilities. The boy hostel is also available with a mess. Quality of the food served is good. The canteen is also available here. The college also provides a transportation facility.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for the students of mechanical engineering when compared to other branches.
reviews.review_text: The campus of HJD Institute has well-structured department wise classrooms, laboratories, and workshops. It also has a library. The hostel facility for girls and boys is available. The college is continuously updating its IT infrastructure to meet current trends.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus has good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available. Classrooms and the library were good. Hostel facilities need to be updated like a more clean area for drinking water. Food quality is good but needs to improve a little. The canteen was average. Sports and games were played less.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in Kutch.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all labs and classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled. In all the labs, there are windows 7 and Ubuntu computers in the computer department. In canteen and mess, all types of food are available. In sports and games, our college is very good from the last 3 years, and they got gold, silver and bronze medals in all sports like indoor and outdoor games.
